message:
Fix scheduler has_pending false positive and clean up session parsing

Scheduler:
- has_pending() now filters out cancelled timers from the timer heap
  instead of reporting pending work when only dead timers remain. This
  prevents the event loop from spinning on a scheduler that has no
  real work to do.
- Add test: has_pending_ignores_cancelled_timers_without_macrotasks

Session (JSONL parser):
- Extract JSONL_PARSE_BATCH_SIZE constant (2048) for clarity
- Fix sequential path to iterate by reference instead of drain(), which
  avoids unnecessary ownership transfer on the non-parallel code path
- Reformat parallel deserialization scope block for readability

Session index:
- Replace if-let/else pattern with idiomatic is_ok_and() for V2
  manifest staleness check

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
